objective: Make the broad unit suite trustworthy and green, de-duplicate CI, and close executable provider-authority manufacture paths without weakening current invariants.
success_criteria: npm run test:unit passes on the exact candidate and is part of Main Integration Gates for pull requests and main pushes.
Every removed or changed assertion is proven obsolete against current Standard, source, migration, or replacement contract evidence.
Browser, model payloads, MCP Apps, AG-UI, and runtime profiles cannot select or receive provider master credentials, provider base URLs, provider identity, or upstream models.
Only Manager-owned registry/policy and deployment configuration resolve provider identity and upstream routing.
Redundant historical workflow triggers and duplicate broad-suite/build execution are removed.
All current source, broad-unit, production-boundary, UI, build, archaeology, and compiled-browser gates pass on the final candidate.
forbidden_files: Hermes image pin or upstream source
